mapper.select: select c.id, c.title, c.content, c.cover_img, c.media_urls, c.category_id, c.activity_sub_category_id, c.user_id, c.status, c.is_private, c.audit_reason, c.is_top, c.view_count, c.like_count, c.favorite_count, c.comment_count, c.price, c.trade_type, c.trade_condition, c.trade_status, c.create_time, c.update_time, cg.name as categoryName, ascg.name as activitySubCategoryName from content c left join category cg on cg.id = c.category_id left join activity_sub_category ascg on ascg.id = c.activity_sub_category_id where c.user_id = #{userId} order by c.create_time desc
select count(1) from content where status = 0 and ifnull(is_private, 0) = 0

select id, title, content, cover_img, media_urls, category_id, activity_sub_category_id, user_id, status, is_private, audit_reason, is_top, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, price, trade_type, trade_condition, trade_status, create_time, update_time from content where status = 0 and ifnull(is_private, 0) = 0 order by create_time asc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select c.id, c.title, c.content, c.cover_img, c.media_urls, c.category_id, c.activity_sub_category_id, c.user_id, c.status, c.is_private, c.audit_reason, c.is_top, c.view_count, c.like_count, c.favorite_count, c.comment_count, c.price, c.trade_type, c.trade_condition, c.trade_status, c.create_time, c.update_time, cg.name as categoryName, ascg.name as activitySubCategoryName from content c left join category cg on cg.id = c.category_id left join activity_sub_category ascg on ascg.id = c.activity_sub_category_id where c.id = #{id} limit 1
select count(1) from content where user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(is_private, 0) = 0
mapper.insert: insert into content (title, content, cover_img, media_urls, category_id, activity_sub_category_id, user_id, status, is_private, audit_reason, is_top, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, price, trade_type, trade_condition, trade_status, create_time, update_time) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{coverImg}, #{mediaUrls}, #{categoryId}, #{activitySubCategoryId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{isPrivate}, #{auditReason}, #{isTop}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{commentCount}, #{price}, #{tradeType}, #{tradeCondition}, #{tradeStatus}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update content set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, cover_img = #{coverImg}, media_urls = #{mediaUrls}, category_id = #{categoryId}, activity_sub_category_id = #{activitySubCategoryId}, status = #{status}, is_private = #{isPrivate}, audit_reason = #{auditReason}, price = #{price}, trade_type = #{tradeType}, trade_condition = #{tradeCondition}, trade_status = #{tradeStatus}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update content set is_top = #{isTop}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, title, content, cover_img, media_urls, category_id, activity_sub_category_id, user_id, status, is_private, audit_reason, is_top, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, price, trade_type, trade_condition, trade_status, create_time, update_time from content where status = 0 and ifnull(is_private, 0) = 0 order by create_time asc
mapper.update: update content set status = #{status}, audit_reason = #{auditReason}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = 0
update content set status = 0, audit_reason = #{auditReason}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update content set comment_count = #{commentCount}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update content set comment_count = ifnull(comment_count, 0) + 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update content set comment_count = case when ifnull(comment_count, 0) > 0 then comment_count - 1 else 0 end, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update content set like_count = ifnull(like_count, 0) + 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update content set like_count = case when ifnull(like_count, 0) > 0 then like_count - 1 else 0 end, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update content set favorite_count = ifnull(favorite_count, 0) + 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update content set favorite_count = case when ifnull(favorite_count, 0) > 0 then favorite_count - 1 else 0 end, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update content set like_count = greatest(ifnull(like_count, 0) + #{delta}, 0), update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update content set view_count = greatest(ifnull(view_count, 0) + #{delta}, 0), update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update content set view_count = ifnull(view_count, 0) + 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}

update content c set like_count = (select count(1) from like_record lr where lr.content_id = c.id), favorite_count = (select count(1) from favorite f where f.content_id = c.id), comment_count = (select count(1) from `comment` cm where cm.content_id = c.id and cm.status = 1), update_time = now() where c.id in
#{id}
